profile.name: Karey Stratford Jr.
profile.title: Technical Leader in Program & Project Management | AI & Data Analytics
profile.summary: Results-driven Senior Program Manager with 15+ years leading enterprise-scale SaaS initiatives in fintech and healthcare. Proven track record managing programs ranging from $2M–$5M+, directing post-merger integrations across 20+ workstreams, and delivering cross-functional projects on time and under budget. PMP and PSM certified with deep expertise in Agile, Scrum, and hybrid delivery models, executive-level reporting, and stakeholder alignment. Adept at translating complex program dependencies into clear roadmaps and driving measurable delivery improvements — including a 46% acceleration in product delivery and 21% year-over-year reduction in time to release.
profile.contactText: Always eager to learn and embrace new challenges. Currently based in North Florida, but open to relocation for the right opportunity.

experience.title: Consulting Business Analyst
description: Assisted with migration and enhancement of Power BI dashboards, integrating data from legacy SQL environments into a new Snowflake‑based servicing platform.
Conducted comprehensive audits and user acceptance testing for insurance outputs and Data Warehouse updates.
Analyzed and audited existing telecom contracts, identifying cost‑saving opportunities delivering 2K in annual savings.
Evaluated Data Warehouse modernization options and authored a strategic white paper for the COO.

experience.title: Product Operations Manager
description: Optimized feature intake and release planning, resulting in a 52% decrease in time to initial review and a 46% acceleration in product delivery.
Analyzed and prioritized backlog to improve cycle times, resulting in a 21% year-over-year reduction in time to release.
Led end-to-end Productboard implementation including configuration, training, and cross-team adoption — saving thousands of hours in backlog and roadmap management.

experience.title: Director of Program Management
description: Directed delivery of 2–5 concurrent enterprise programs for the Default Platform, coordinating backlogs across 4 cross-functional teams and managing dependencies for an 85-person engineering organization.
Built delivery frameworks from scratch for two new enterprise products — Claims and Loss Mitigation — establishing program structure, roadmap cadence, and cross-team execution processes.

Provided weekly program status reporting to C-suite and VP-level leadership using executive roadmaps, Gantt charts, and resource reports; delivered quarterly analytics and board-level decks on portfolio progress.
Co-led capacity planning and strategic team alignment with the Director of Engineering across Product and Engineering to optimize resource allocation and delivery throughput.

experience.title: Program Manager (Contract)
description: Spearheaded 20-workstream enterprise merger integration, personally driving execution across 4 major IT tracks, managing cross-functional dependencies, and delivering weekly CxO rollup reporting.
Authored SOW for BOA/Rivian partnership on the defi Solutions cloud platform.

experience.title: Sr. Program Manager (Contract)
description: Unified 7 cross-functional teams using Scrum/hybrid methods to deliver two annual enrollment projects on time and under budget, mitigating risk and maintaining full stakeholder alignment.
Used MS Project for budgeting and timelines for financial reporting in the EPM system.

experience.title: Integration Program Manager
description: Directed $5M Freddie Mac Investor Reporting initiative (100,000+ hours) and $2M Mainframe Encryption program on IBM mainframe — both delivered on schedule.
Served as onsite Technical Project Consultant for OneMain-Springleaf fintech merger.
Championed delivery of Black Knight's first consumer-facing web and mobile application, orchestrating integration across mobile and web teams to meet aggressive launch timelines.
Supported vendor integrations via Postman and SoapUI; managed work prioritization, defect tracking, and daily Scrum ceremonies for two vendors.
Leveraged Splunk for security monitoring and log analysis in vendor API integration workflows.
Previous roles included Project Manager, Business Consultant, QA Manager (managing a blended team of 20+ QA testers in US and India), and QA Analyst.

education.degree: Master's Degree, Business Administration and Management (MBA)
Bachelor of Science, Electrical and Computer Engineering (BSEE)

projects.title: Black Knight Consumer Web/Mobile Launch
projects.description: Directed the vendor integration and delivery of the organization's first consumer-facing mobile and responsive web applications.
projects.impact: Successfully launched high-visibility digital products using hybrid Agile/Waterfall methodologies.

projects.title: defi & Sagent Enterprise Integration
projects.description: Orchestrated enterprise-wide IT integration post-merger of defi and Sagent Auto from Fiserv.
projects.impact: Directed four critical IT workstreams and spearheaded weekly executive 'bridge' reporting for a 20+ workstream enterprise merger, ensuring seamless cross-functional alignment and real-time risk mitigation for C-suite stakeholders.

projects.title: Default Management Platform (Tempo)
projects.description: Directed program delivery for the core Default Management platform, managing four cross-functional teams.
projects.impact: Improved resource utilization and engineering capacity planning through executive roadmap alignment.

metrics.description: Decrease in time to initial review by streamlining cross-functional coordination.

metrics.description: Year-over-year reduction in time to release via prioritized backlog management.

metrics.description: Years leading software development, QA, and IT program management initiatives.
